ops.title: Fix Advance TOCTOU: never sweep live edits from a jj working copy
ops.description: jjRepo.Advance classifies @ via probeWorkingCopy then mutates via jj new/jj rebase, whose own at-execution snapshot can capture edits typed in between; the swept content lands in a non-empty anonymous head while vanishing from disk. Fix per approved plan (~/.claude/plans/two-bumps-worth-nifty-gadget.md): post-mutation verification (changeSurvived + opsSince allowlist), forward recovery (rebase swept change onto trunk when conflict-free, else original base, then jj edit), OutcomeRecovered/OutcomeSwept, PATH-shim race-injection tests.

ops.text: TestJJAdvanceSweptMidNewRecovers passes: dirt injected at the jj new argv comes back byte-identical, OutcomeRecovered
Branch B verify-before-restore: foreign path aborts restores and recovers; clean generated-only path unchanged
go test ./... -race green and CI green on main
0.15.1 released and deployed to both hosts; post-deploy repro shows recovery line in daemon log
